scripts.supabase:functions:check: for dir in supabase/functions/*; do if [ -f "$dir/deno.json" ] && [ -f "$dir/index.ts" ]; then deno fmt --check "$dir/index.ts" && deno lint "$dir/index.ts" && deno check --config "$dir/deno.json" "$dir/index.ts"; fi; done
scripts.supabase:policy:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root='supabase';const bad=[];const walk=(dir)=>{for(const e of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=path.join(dir,e.name);if(e.isDirectory()) walk(p); else if(e.isFile()&&p.endsWith('.sql')){const t=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(/auth\\.jwt\\(\\)\\s*->>\\s*'role'\\s*=\\s*'admin'/.test(t)) bad.push(p);}}};walk(root);if(bad.length){console.error('Found JWT admin-only policy checks in:');bad.forEach(f=>console.error(f));process.exit(1);}console.log('Supabase policy check passed.');"
